projectDescription: Bluplai is a customer success platform that helps teams manage accounts, track engagement, plan initiatives, and measure ROI across the full customer lifecycle.
keyFeatures: Multi-tenant organization management with role-based access control
Customer account tracking with lifecycle stages and health scores
Project management with initiatives, milestones, and action items
Customer Success Plans (CSP) with Kanban and Gantt timeline views
Pulse hub for interviews, surveys, and satisfaction tracking
Adoption tracking with module-level usage metrics
Visual workflow builder for customer process mapping
ROI and value tracking with business outcome drivers
Stakeholder maps with influence and opportunity views
Analytics dashboard with activity trends and engagement charts
Discovery module for capturing customer goals, challenges, and workshops
publicApiSurface: GET /accounts/:id — account detail with projects and stakeholders
GET /projects — list projects by lifecycle stage
GET /pulse — interviews, surveys, and satisfaction overview
GET /drivers — business drivers, outcomes, and value (ROI)
GET /discovery — discovery notes, goals, and challenges per project
GET /stakeholders — stakeholder list and relationship data
GET /stakeholder-maps — stakeholder horizon and opportunity maps
